rationale: Two narrow constant edits matching the PR description exactly. In openhands/app_server/utils/llm.py the DEFAULT_OPENHANDS_MODEL string changes from 'openhands/claude-opus-4-5-20251101' to 'openhands/minimax-m2.7'. In enterprise/server/constants.py a new key '6' mapping to 'minimax-m2.7' is appended to PERSONAL_WORKSPACE_VERSION_TO_MODEL, and a stale comment about Minimax pricing is removed. No test changes, no logic flow changes, and the model alias is documented in the body as already verified in the SDK.
